text.title: Unit Testing (FIRST + AAA) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply unit-testing. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Pick a naming convention (r3) and document it in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
step.description: Input: team policy. Action: Choose one; commit.. Output: policy doc.

step.name: For each new test, write the AAA scaffold first; fill in.
step.description: Input: code under test. Action: Author Arrange / Act / Assert.. Output: test file.
step.note: Step 2. Required input: code under test.

step.name: Inject collaborators (clock, RNG, IO) instead of using globals; ensure FIRST compliance.
step.description: Input: code under test. Action: Refactor signatures if needed.. Output: testable code.
step.note: Step 3. Required input: code under test.

step.name: Run with `--randomize` or `--shuffle`; fix order-dependent failures.
step.description: Input: test suite. Action: Reproduce in shuffled order; fix isolation bugs.. Output: isolated suite.

step.name: Gate CI on coverage thresholds + max-runtime per test.
step.description: Input: stable suite. Action: Add CI step.. Output: CI gate.
